description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Cursed</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
